rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings.
Component ports and connections referenced in AGREE contracts must be valid in the target scope.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structural integrity when inserting AGREE annexes.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE contracts.
Do not assume AADL properties are automatically available as AGREE variables.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level bindings require valid subcomponent and connection references.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-specific AGREE clauses in component type scopes.
Do not reference AADL property names directly as AGREE variables without proper scope mapping.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
